name: Chinese Joy Pot
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Frozen leaf spinach, thawed and drained (8 oz each)
8 oz Firm tofu, cut into 1-inch cubes
2 Green bell peppers, cut into 1/2-inch thick strips
2 Red bell peppers, cut into 1/2-inch thick strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275°F.
2. In a small saucepan, heat soy sauce, peanut butter, sesame oil, and curry over medium heat, stirring until well blended. If needed, add hot water to make a thin sauce.
3. Combine the sauce with the remaining ingredients in a large roasting pan or casserole dish.
4. Place the mixture in the oven and cook, covered, for 2 hours.
5. Serve hot.
